title: disperis monophylla
intro: Disperis monophylla, also known as the single-leaved Disperis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Disperis monophylla include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Disperis monophylla can be made into a paste or ointment, or infused in water as a tea, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
